title: People column - error 500

posts.author: Lauriane (Lauriane)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I am sync on Monday through Zapier.
I am trying to assign several people to one people column using the following:
{“personsAndTeams”:[{“id”:11771444,“kind”:“person”}, {“id”:1460333,“kind”:“person”}]}
it gives me an error 500

I made sure it is a people column (not a person one)

How can I get to assign several people to one item?

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @Lauriane – welcome to the community! Can you share a screenshot of your Zapier configuration so we can take a look?
